ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the user */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user undergoing the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the motion capture session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer conducting the session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Type of equipment used during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "motion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion data entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding session */,
  "left_shoulder" REAL /* Angle or position of the left shoulder */,
  "right_shoulder" REAL /* Angle or position of the right shoulder */,
  "left_elbow" REAL /* Angle or position of the left elbow */,
  "right_elbow" REAL /* Angle or position of the right elbow */,
  "left_wrist" REAL /* Angle or position of the left wrist */,
  "right_wrist" REAL /* Angle or position of the right wrist */,
  "left_hip" REAL /* Angle or position of the left hip */,
  "right_hip" REAL /* Angle or position of the right hip */,
  "left_knee" REAL /* Angle or position of the left knee */,
  "right_knee" REAL /* Angle or position of the right knee */,
  "left_ankle" REAL /* Angle or position of the left ankle */,
  "right_ankle" REAL /* Angle or position of the right ankle */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the motion data entry was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the motion data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("motion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding session */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score derived from motion data analysis */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "injury_risk_score" REAL /* Score indicating the risk of injury */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Specific suggestions for improvement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trainer, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the session was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
